# Shi Ke (施可)

> AI Agent founder and former Linhuiba COO. Building Dropleap (水滴跃动), an enterprise AI implementation services company. 16+ years across engineering, product, enterprise sales, and operations.

施可 (Shi Ke) is an entrepreneur with an MSc in Software Engineering from the University of Science and Technology of China (USTC). His non-linear path: software engineer → product lead → founder → COO → AI Agent founder.

## Identity

- **Name**: 施可 (Shi Ke)
- **Role**: Founder, Dropleap (水滴跃动)
- **Previous**: COO, Linhuiba (2022–2026)
- **Education**: MSc in Software Engineering, USTC
- **Email**: shike@dropleap.cn
- **Website**: https://shike.github.io/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/shike

## Current focus

Building Dropleap (水滴跃动) — an enterprise AI implementation services company that helps clients embed LLMs and AI Agents into real business workflows. End-to-end services cover AI strategy consulting, agent solution design, application engineering (LLM, Multi-Agent, RAG, Tool Use), and deployment operations.

## Career path

- 2026–present — Founder, Dropleap (水滴跃动). Enterprise AI implementation services.
- 2022–2026 — COO, Linhuiba. Delivered +80% revenue growth in 6 months as CMO; cut operating costs 15% and accounts receivable 60%. Built Location AI site intelligence platform from 0→1 (Alibaba Cloud AI Competition Silver Award; joint research center with Zhejiang University). Served Xiaomi EV, Xiaomi 3C, Xiaotiancai, Yiheetang, and others.
- 2021–2022 — Product Lead, Hellobike Hotel (Hellobike / 哈啰出行). Core BU decision-maker. Built B-side & C-side product systems and membership growth loops.
- 2016–2021 — Product & Tech Lead, Tongcheng-Elong (HK:0780), International Hotels division.
- 2015–2016 — Founder, Ball Chief Tribe (苏州踢来踢去网络). Raised RMB 3M angel from Zihui Ventures (post-money valuation: RMB 20M).
- 2009–2014 — Software Engineer → Tech Manager at NCS (Singtel Group) and Founder International. Worked on enterprise projects including Yum! Brands' franchise development system. Multiple Singapore implementation assignments.

## Expertise

- **AI Agent / LLM Engineering**: LLM application development, Multi-Agent orchestration, Tool Use & Function Calling, RAG, agent evaluation and observability
- **Product 0→1**: User insight → PRD → MVP → scaled iteration, cross-functional engineering / product / business lens
- **KA Enterprise Sales**: Full enterprise account lifecycle (insight, proposal, negotiation, long-term relationship management) with top brands
- **Operations & Team Leadership**: Nationwide expansion, multi-city team building, organizational design, performance and incentive systems
- **Data-Driven Decision Making**: Business metrics, footfall/ROI analysis, A/B experiments, methodology codification
- **Public Speaking**: Industry keynotes, brand storytelling, technical writing

## Brands served

Xiaomi EV (小米汽车), Xiaomi 3C (小米 3C), XPeng (小鹏), Volkswagen (大众), ASICS (亚瑟士), Yiheetang (益禾堂), KaWangKa (卡旺卡), Xiaotiancai (小天才), imoo, Yifeng Pharmacy (益丰大药房), Jinuo Fu (基诺辅).

## Ventures & products

- **数商方略 (Shushang Fanglue)** — https://shushangfanglue.com/ — China's B2B software agent-matching platform. 1,000+ enterprise software listings with transparent reseller-policy comparison and real agent reviews; helps agents select products and vendors acquire customers.
- **Minibus EV** — https://minibus-ev.com/ — Export brand of Leqi (Suzhou) IoT Technology. Cartoon-themed electric sightseeing vehicles for theme parks, resorts, and scenic destinations. 9 product series, ~200 partner scenic areas, 25+ cities deployed, zero safety accidents; vertically integrated factory since 2008.
- **NihaoVisit** — https://www.nihaovisit.com/ — Practical China travel guides for foreign visitors; structured long-form content covering major China destinations and on-the-ground tips.

## Authorized agent

- **微盟星启 GEO (Weimob Xingqi GEO)** — https://www.xingqigeo.cn/ — Weimob Group's Generative Engine Optimization platform (released Jan 2026), lifting brand reach and acquisition across AI search engines (Doubao, Yuanbao, DeepSeek). Shi Ke is an authorized agent.
- **呼波特 WhoBot** — https://www.whobot.com/ — AI phone-call digital employee from Beijing Whobot AI. LLM-powered 24/7 outbound calling replacing manual work for ~10x efficiency; 100+ clients incl. Kuafu, Dongchedi, Oppein. Shi Ke is an authorized agent.

## Selected operations case

- **2026 World Cup licensed pop-up stores · 3-city tour** — Riding the 2026 FIFA World Cup, landed officially licensed pop-up stores across three cities: Changzhou Jiangnan Global Harbor (outdoor plaza), Wuxi LIVAT Shopping Centre (indoor atrium), and Shanghai CapitaMall Hongkou Dragon Dream (next to Hongkou Football Stadium). Operated by FanTown (聚星动力); carried licensed national-team jerseys, player memorabilia, figures, and trading cards (Argentina, Portugal, France, etc.), paired with photo installations and a cross-city card-collection campaign that turned event traffic into measurable footfall and sales.

## Public speaking (selected)

- 2024.12 — Keynote: "Slow-Pop-Up Experiential Marketing, Reshaping Offline Channel Value" — Breakthrough · 2024 Daofa Annual Brand Summit, Shanghai
- 2024.12 — Keynote: "Small & Beautiful, Flexible & Precise — How Slow-Pop-Ups Help Brands Break Through" — 5th TBI Outstanding Brand Innovation Festival, Shanghai
- 2024.12 — Moderator: "Super Single Product vs. Brand Matrix" — 5th TBI Innovation Festival Morning Debate, Shanghai
